emptyState.welcome: Welcome to Paperclip. Set up your first company and agent to get started.
emptyState.noCompany: Create or select a company to view the dashboard.

budgetIncident.subtitle: {{pausedAgents}} agents paused · {{pausedProjects}} projects paused · {{pendingApprovals}} pending budget approvals

issues.title: Issues
issues.selectCompany: Select a company to view issues.

projects.title: Projects
projects.selectCompany: Select a company to view projects.

agents.title: Agents
agents.selectCompany: Select a company to view agents.
agents.noAgents: Create your first agent to get started.
agents.noMatches: No agents match the selected filter.

costs.title: Costs
costs.selectCompanyToViewCosts: Select a company to view costs.
costs.description: Inference spend, platform fees, credits, and live quota windows.
costs.selectStartEndDateToLoadData: Select a start and end date to load data.
costs.financeLedgerDescription: Account-level charges that do not map to a single inference request.
costs.netDescription: Debit minus credit for the selected period
costs.estimatedDescription: Estimated debits that are not yet invoice-authoritative
costs.inferenceLedgerDescription: Request-scoped inference spend for the selected period.
costs.monthlyBudgetConsumed: {{percent}}% of monthly budget consumed in this range.
costs.byAgentDescription: What each agent consumed in the selected period.
costs.byProjectDescription: Run costs attributed through project-linked issues.
costs.noFinanceEventsYetLong: No finance events yet. Add account-level charges once biller invoices or credits land.
costs.budgetControlPlaneDescription: Hard-stop spend limits for agents and projects. Provider subscription quota stays separate and appears under Providers.
costs.activeIncidentsDescription: Open soft or hard threshold crossings
costs.pendingApprovalsDescription: Budget override approvals awaiting board action
costs.activeIncidentsSectionDescription: Resolve hard stops here by raising the budget or explicitly keeping the scope paused.
costs.agentBudgetDescription: Recurring monthly spend policies for individual agents.
costs.projectBudgetDescription: Lifetime spend policies for execution-bound projects.
costs.noBudgetPoliciesYet: No budget policies yet. Set agent and project budgets from their detail pages, or use the existing company monthly budget control.
costs.noCostEventsInThisPeriod: No cost events in this period.
costs.byBillerDescription: Account-level financial events grouped by who charged or credited them.
costs.noBillableEventsInThisPeriod: No billable events in this period.

profileSettings.title: Profile
profileSettings.description: Control how your account appears in the sidebar and other board surfaces.
profileSettings.uploadAvatarError: Select a company before uploading a profile avatar.

uploadHint.stored: Stored in Paperclip file storage for {{name}}.
uploadHint.select: Select a company to upload an avatar into Paperclip storage.

profileSettings.avatarClickHint: Click the avatar to upload a new image. {{hint}}

displayName.label: Display name
displayName.hint: Shown in the sidebar account footer and comment author surfaces.

email.label: Email
email.hint: Email is managed by your auth session and is read-only here.

instanceSettings.title: Scheduler Heartbeats
instanceSettings.description: Agents with a timer heartbeat enabled across all of your companies.

disableTimerError.other: Failed to disable {{count}} of {{total}} timer heartbeats. First error: {{detail}}

instanceSettings.confirmDisableAll: Disable timer heartbeats for all {{count}} enabled {{noun}}?
instanceSettings.emptyState: No scheduler heartbeats match the current criteria.

companySettings.title: Company Settings
companySettings.noCompanySelected: No company selected. Select a company from the switcher above.

name.label: Company name
name.hint: The display name for your company.

description.label: Description
description.hint: Optional description shown in the company profile.

logo.label: Logo
logo.hint: Upload a PNG, JPEG, WEBP, GIF, or SVG logo image.

brandColor.label: Brand color
brandColor.hint: Sets the hue for the company icon. Leave empty for auto-generated color.

attachmentLimit.label: Attachment size limit
attachmentLimit.error: Enter a whole number from 1 to {{max}}.

approval.label: Require board approval for new hires
approval.hint: New agent hires stay pending until approved by board.

packages.description: Import and export have moved to dedicated pages accessible from the <1>Org Chart</1> header.

archive.description: Archive this company to hide it from the sidebar. This persists in the database.
archive.confirm: Archive company "{{name}}"? It will be hidden from the sidebar.
